description:
The Coronation of Elizabeth II was the first event to be broadcast live internationally by Eurovison Services. Learn from Alexander Rose how technology has evolved since then and which role AWS Services play in live video broadcasting today.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: Eurovision Services: From the Stadium to the Cloud, Redundant Live Video Flows in the AWS Cloud
